rationale: Educ. Code §49.301 merely defines 'mineral property' for its subchapter. It has no relation to the residence homestead exemption amount in Tax Code §11.13(b).
quote: Sec. 49.301. DEFINITION. In this subchapter, "mineral property" means a real property mineral interest that has been severed from the surface estate by a mineral lease creating a determinable fee or by a conveyance that creates an interest taxable separately from the surface estate.
_note: No conflict; rule defines mineral property and does not reference homestead exemptions.
